title: Communication Tools
description: JSON Schema definitions for communication tools available to the ideas-brillantes assistant. Covers email sending and reading, Slack messaging, calendar event creation, and desktop notifications.

tools.name: send_email
tools.description: Compose and send an email message via the configured email account.

to.description: Recipient email address or list of addresses.

body.description: Body of the email. Plain text or HTML depending on the configured mailer.

attachments.description: Optional list of absolute file paths to attach to the email.

tools.name: read_email
tools.description: Fetch emails from a mailbox folder, optionally filtered by a search string.

folder.description: Mailbox folder to read from (e.g. 'INBOX', 'Sent', 'Drafts'). Defaults to 'INBOX'.

filter.description: Optional search string to filter emails by subject, sender, or body content.

limit.description: Maximum number of emails to return, ordered by most recent first. Defaults to 20.

tools.name: send_slack
tools.description: Post a message to a Slack channel or thread.

channel.description: Slack channel name (e.g. '#general') or channel ID to post the message to.

message.description: Message text to post. Supports Slack mrkdwn formatting.

thread_ts.description: Optional timestamp of the parent message to reply in a thread (e.g. '1234567890.123456').

tools.name: create_calendar_event
tools.description: Create a new event in the user's calendar.

title.description: Title or summary of the calendar event.

start.description: Start date and time of the event in ISO 8601 format (e.g. '2026-05-01T09:00:00+02:00').

end.description: End date and time of the event in ISO 8601 format.

attendees.description: Optional list of attendee email addresses to invite.

description.description: Optional detailed description or notes for the event.

tools.name: send_notification
tools.description: Display a desktop notification to the user via libnotify / notify-send.

title.description: Short title displayed at the top of the notification.

message.description: Notification body text with additional details.

urgency.description: Notification urgency level that controls how long it stays visible and its visual style. Defaults to 'normal'.
